title: North American Clean Fuels Market: Month-in-Review May 2025
content:
Key Takeaways:

California LCFS:
  • CA LCFS average Type 1 monthly credit price fell by 1.63% month-over-month (MoM) in May.
  • Monthly credit transactions decreased by 68.63% MoM in May.
    Â 
British Columbia LCFS:
  • BC LCFS monthly trading volumes saw a decline of 31.8x times MoM.
  • In April, BC LCFS rose in credit prices by 29.23 % MoM.
Oregon CFP:
  • In April, OR CFP average credit prices increased by 11.45% compared to March.
  • OR CFP trading activity in April saw a 85.30% decline MoM.
Canada CFR:
  • Canada CFR bid and offer prices for CC2 & CC3 rose MoM in May.
  • Average CC2 credit price stands at 165 CAD & Average CC3 credit price is at 161 CAD.
Washington CFS:
  • Average credit prices in WA CFS rose by 27.6% MoM.
  • For April, 203.735 K credits were traded with a total transaction value of $4.59 M.
Â United States RFS:
  • RIN generation decreased by 6.45% in April.
  • A total of 4.00B RINs were transacted in April, 51.31% less than March.
author: Mansift Kaur
